# Unity Swimming School Bali

> Swimming school in Bali offering swimming lessons for kids and adults, private swimming coaching, open water swimming training, and beginner freediving lessons.

Unity Swimming School Bali (UNITY) provides professional swimming instruction across Bali, including Jimbaran, Ungasan, Nusa Dua, Sanur, Ubud, and Canggu. Lessons are available for children and adults, in private or group format, with experienced coaches. The school also runs open water swimming coaching and beginner-friendly freediving courses.

## Website

- [Unity Swimming School Bali](https://unityswimmingbali.com/): Home page with overview of all services.

## Main services

- [Kids swimming lessons in Bali](https://unityswimmingbali.com/kids-swimming-lessons-bali): Group and private swimming classes for children across Bali.
- [Adult swimming lessons in Bali](https://unityswimmingbali.com/adult-swimming-lessons-bali): Beginners, technique improvement, and confidence-building for adults.
- [Freediving Bali — beginner lessons](https://unityswimmingbali.com/freediving-bali): Breathing, relaxation, equalization, and safe freediving basics.
- [Programs](https://unityswimmingbali.com/programs): Full list of swimming and freediving programs.
- [Prices](https://unityswimmingbali.com/prices): Pricing for private and group lessons.
- [Contact](https://unityswimmingbali.com/contact): Booking and contact information.

## Service areas

Bali, Jimbaran, Ungasan, Nusa Dua, Sanur, Ubud, Canggu.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +62 821-4723-2648
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/swimming.unity.bali/
